title: Asterisk Codec Mismatch and Transcoding Load from Full Log
app: Custom TA, HEC, or Universal Forwarder mapping Asterisk logs to `asterisk:pjsip`, `asterisk:cdr`, `asterisk:queue_log`, `asterisk:full`, `asterisk:messages`, `asterisk:security`, `asterisk:ami`
spl:
index=voip (sourcetype="asterisk:full" OR sourcetype="asterisk:messages") earliest=-24h
| eval host=coalesce(host, hostname, "")
| where match(lower(_raw), "(?i)transcod|codec.*(mismatch|incompatible)|no joint capabilities|slin32|slin16")
| stats count by host
| sort -count
description: Codec negotiation failures force software transcoding, raising CPU and latency on virtual PBX nodes.
value: Avoids peak-hour brownouts and improves voice quality by aligning allow-lists.
implementation: (1) Filter verbose logs to manage volume. (2) Trend by host and trunk. (3) Remediate endpoint and gateway codec lists.
visualization: Top hosts bar; timechart event rate.
grandmaExplanation: We catch forced audio conversions that overload the call server.
